picks.name: Semiconductors & Semiconductor Equipment
picks.fund: iShares Semiconductor — NVDA, AVGO, AMD, TSM, LRCX, KLAC, ASML, MU, INTC

picks.name: Energy
picks.fund: SPDR Energy Select Sector — XOM, CVX, COP, EOG, MPC, PSX

picks.name: Automobiles & Components
picks.fund: First Trust S&P Global Auto Index — TSLA, TM, GM, F, STLA, HMC

picks.name: Telecommunication Services
picks.fund: iShares US Telecommunications — T, VZ, TMUS

picks.name: Materials

defensive.fund: SPDR 1-3 Month Treasury Bill ETF (cash proxy)
iShares 20+ Year Treasury Bond ETF (long duration)
iShares Investment Grade Corporate Bond ETF

all_industry_groups.name: Energy
all_industry_groups.fund: SPDR Energy Select Sector — XOM, CVX, COP, EOG, MPC, PSX
all_industry_groups.rationale_proxy: XLE is the canonical large-cap US energy ETF; covers integrated, E&P, refining, midstream.

all_industry_groups.name: Materials
all_industry_groups.fund: SPDR Materials Select Sector — LIN, SHW, FCX, ECL, NEM
all_industry_groups.rationale_proxy: XLB is the canonical Materials ETF.

all_industry_groups.name: Capital Goods
all_industry_groups.fund: SPDR Industrials Select Sector — CAT, HON, GE, RTX, BA, DE, LMT
all_industry_groups.rationale_proxy: XLI is dominated by Capital Goods constituents (~70%); imperfect but liquid proxy.

all_industry_groups.name: Commercial & Professional Services
all_industry_groups.fund: Equal-weight basket — Waste Mgmt / Republic Svcs / Cintas / Robert Half / Equifax / Verisk / Booz Allen / RB Global
all_industry_groups.rationale_proxy: No clean ETF for GICS 2020; spans environmental, business, data/analytics services.

all_industry_groups.name: Transportation
all_industry_groups.fund: iShares US Transportation — UPS, FDX, UNP, NSC, CSX, DAL, UAL
all_industry_groups.rationale_proxy: IYT is the canonical transports ETF; rails, airlines, parcels, trucking. Inception 2003.

all_industry_groups.name: Automobiles & Components
all_industry_groups.fund: First Trust S&P Global Auto Index — TSLA, TM, GM, F, STLA, HMC
all_industry_groups.rationale_proxy: Tesla-heavy, includes major OEMs + parts. Inception 2011.

all_industry_groups.name: Consumer Durables & Apparel
all_industry_groups.fund: Equal-weight basket — Nike / Lululemon / Deckers / On / Ralph Lauren / Tapestry / Capri / Whirlpool / Mohawk / Leggett / Hasbro
all_industry_groups.rationale_proxy: Apparel + footwear + accessories + household durables + leisure products. No clean ETF.

all_industry_groups.name: Consumer Services
all_industry_groups.fund: Invesco Dynamic Leisure & Entertainment — MAR, HLT, BKNG, MGM, MCD
all_industry_groups.rationale_proxy: PEJ aligns ~70% with GICS 2530 (hotels, restaurants, leisure). Inception 2005.

all_industry_groups.name: Consumer Discretionary Distribution & Retail
all_industry_groups.fund: SPDR S&P Retail — equal-weight retailers, AAP/BBY/ORLY/ROST/TJX/ULTA
all_industry_groups.rationale_proxy: XRT equal-weights retailers; better captures the IG than a cap-weighted alternative.

all_industry_groups.name: Consumer Staples Distribution & Retail
all_industry_groups.fund: Equal-weight basket — Walmart / Costco / Kroger / Target / Dollar General / Dollar Tree / BJ's / Albertsons
all_industry_groups.rationale_proxy: Mass merchants + grocery + dollar stores. No clean ETF.

all_industry_groups.name: Food, Beverage & Tobacco
all_industry_groups.fund: Invesco Food & Beverage — KO, PEP, MO, PM, MDLZ, KHC, KDP, GIS
all_industry_groups.rationale_proxy: PBJ holds ~30 large food/beverage/tobacco names. Inception 2005.

all_industry_groups.name: Household & Personal Products
all_industry_groups.fund: Equal-weight basket — P&G / Colgate / Kimberly-Clark / Church & Dwight / Estée Lauder / Coty / Clorox / Chewy / Hormel
all_industry_groups.rationale_proxy: Personal care + household products. No clean ETF.

all_industry_groups.name: Health Care Equipment & Services
all_industry_groups.fund: iShares US Medical Devices — TMO, ABT, MDT, BSX, SYK, ISRG, EW, BDX
all_industry_groups.rationale_proxy: IHI captures the equipment slice cleanly; services slice (UNH/CVS) under-represented (documented limitation).

all_industry_groups.name: Pharmaceuticals, Biotechnology & Life Sciences
all_industry_groups.fund: SPDR Health Care — JNJ, LLY, MRK, ABBV, PFE, TMO, AMGN, GILD
all_industry_groups.rationale_proxy: XLV dominated by pharma/biotech/life sciences (~75%). v9.1 collapses the v9 split (XLV+IBB) to one IG.

all_industry_groups.name: Banks
all_industry_groups.fund: SPDR Financials — JPM, BRK.B, BAC, WFC, GS, MS, C, USB, PNC
all_industry_groups.rationale_proxy: XLF is bank-heavy. Insurance/Financial Services slices represented separately in 4030/4020.

all_industry_groups.name: Financial Services
all_industry_groups.fund: iShares US Financial Services — V, MA, JPM, BLK, AXP, SPGI, MCO, ICE
all_industry_groups.rationale_proxy: Payments + exchanges + data/index + asset mgrs. Inception 2000.

all_industry_groups.name: Insurance
all_industry_groups.fund: SPDR S&P Insurance — PGR, CB, AIG, MET, AFL, ALL, TRV, PRU, HIG
all_industry_groups.rationale_proxy: Equal-weights US insurance carriers (P&C, life, multiline). Inception 2005.

all_industry_groups.name: Software & Services
all_industry_groups.fund: iShares Expanded Tech-Software — MSFT, ORCL, ADBE, CRM, INTU, NOW, SNOW, PANW
all_industry_groups.rationale_proxy: IGV is canonical software ETF; underweights services slightly but cleanest proxy.

all_industry_groups.name: Technology Hardware & Equipment
all_industry_groups.fund: Equal-weight basket — Apple / Cisco / HP / Dell / Seagate / WD / Juniper / NetApp / Zebra / CDW / Arista / Motorola Solutions
all_industry_groups.rationale_proxy: AAPL dominates GICS 4520 by mcap (~60%); equal-weight basket reduces single-name distortion.

all_industry_groups.name: Semiconductors & Semiconductor Equipment
all_industry_groups.fund: iShares Semiconductor — NVDA, AVGO, AMD, TSM, LRCX, KLAC, ASML, MU, INTC
all_industry_groups.rationale_proxy: SOXX is canonical semi ETF. Inception 2001.

all_industry_groups.name: Telecommunication Services
all_industry_groups.fund: iShares US Telecommunications — T, VZ, TMUS
all_industry_groups.rationale_proxy: Canonical telecoms ETF; slight inflation vs strict GICS 5010 but standard proxy.

all_industry_groups.name: Media & Entertainment
all_industry_groups.fund: SPDR Communication Services — META, GOOGL, NFLX, DIS, EA, TTWO, WBD
all_industry_groups.rationale_proxy: Dominant exposure is Media & Entertainment (~80%); slight overlap with IYZ on telecoms. Inception 2018.

all_industry_groups.name: Utilities
all_industry_groups.fund: SPDR Utilities — NEE, SO, DUK, CEG, AEP, SRE, D, EXC
all_industry_groups.rationale_proxy: Canonical utilities ETF.

all_industry_groups.name: Equity REITs
all_industry_groups.fund: iShares US Real Estate — PLD, AMT, EQIX, WELL, SPG, O, DLR, PSA
all_industry_groups.rationale_proxy: Covers all REIT subsectors.

all_industry_groups.name: Real Estate Management & Development
all_industry_groups.fund: Equal-weight basket — CBRE / JLL / Zillow / eXp / Opendoor / Redfin / Newmark / Kennedy-Wilson
all_industry_groups.rationale_proxy: Non-REIT real estate (brokerages + online platforms + holding). No clean ETF.
